api_key.description: Oura OAuth2 bearer access token, kept under the legacy api_key field name for compatibility. Sent as Authorization: Bearer <api_key>.

base_url.description: Oura API v2 root URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: Optional YYYY-MM-DD lower-bound query value for date-based usercollection list streams.

end_date.description: Optional YYYY-MM-DD upper-bound query value for date-based usercollection list streams.

start_datetime.description: Optional RFC3339 lower-bound query value for time-series usercollection streams.

end_datetime.description: Optional RFC3339 upper-bound query value for time-series usercollection streams.

latest.description: Optional Oura latest query flag for time-series streams; use the API documented value.

document_id.description: Document id used only by *_detail streams.
